metadata.behavioral_health_services_tax_formula: Subtract $1,000,000 from Form 540 line 19 taxable income or Form 540NR line 35 nonresident California-source taxable income, multiply the positive excess by 1%, and enter the result on estimated-tax worksheet line 17.
metadata.line_4_tax_materials_direction: Figure tax on worksheet line 3 using the 2025 tax table for Form 540 or Form 540NR, and include any tax from FTB 3800 and FTB 3803.
metadata.source_note: Official tax-year-2026 Form 540-ES instructions and California Estimated Tax Worksheet. The worksheet publishes 2026 standard deductions of $5,706 for single or married/RDP filing separately and $11,412 for married/RDP filing jointly, head of household, or qualifying surviving spouse/RDP. Line 4 expressly directs use of the 2025 Form 540 or Form 540NR tax table; this intake therefore does not project a final tax-year-2026 return schedule. Section D and worksheet line 17 impose the 1% Behavioral Health Services Tax on taxable income over $1,000,000. This source supports estimated-tax worksheet computation only and does not certify complete final-return liability.
metadata.title: 2026 Instructions for Form 540-ES — Estimated Tax for Individuals
